meaning: n.鏅壊,椋庡厜,瑙傜偣,瑙佽В,灞曟湜,鍓嶆櫙
examples: He had a practical outlook on life.
I adopted a positive outlook on life.
The house has a pleasant outlook over the valley.
By the time she returned home to Belgium three months later, her outlook had changed completely.
This fact combined with the 2006 law change has created a negative outlook for lump-sum pension values.
